{{Quote|When did a second-class scavenger like you pick up even a cast-off cruiser?|Han Solo to Crimson Jack|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 7">[[Star Wars (1977) 7|''Star Wars'' (1977) 7]]</ref>}}
This former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] '''battlecruiser''' was in operation as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:3moons.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Crimson Jack's cruiser in the Drexel system]]
The ship was driven by four main engines and a possible fifth, though this center engine appeared to be covered by [[Armor/Legends|armor]] at times, and might have functioned only as an auxiliary engine for emergencies. The hull was sleeker and more rounded than the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], and the main body was much more flat, with a protruding bulb towards the dorsal front of the ship.

==History==
The ship was damaged during a [[Battle of Toprawa|battle]] with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and left adrift. After the battle, it was discovered by the space [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]] and his gang, who proceeded to kill the remaining crew members and use the vessel as their own base of operations. They repaired and modified the ship with backing from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

They captured the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] with a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], and were lured to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drexel/Legends|Drexel]] where [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] claimed a secret Rebel treasury would be found. This venture turned out to be a trap and a failure for Crimson Jack, as his ship was permanently damaged when his second-in-command, [[Jolli]], betrayed him and rammed the ship's command tower with her [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighter]].

The hulk was left to drift in orbit of Drexel, where it was found by Jabba's agents some time later. They recovered data from the ship's computer that revealed Solo's involvement in its destruction. Jabba furiously reposted the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Solo that had been revoked some time earlier.
